_comment: Countermarch (exelismos, issue #375, drill mode -- player army only, no enemy, no auto-win): three identical Spearmen regiments spawned side by side, each commanded through a DIFFERENT one of the three historical variants so their distinct ground outcomes are visible side by side in one clip, rather than accumulating on a single unit: select the left unit and press Shift+V for Choral/Persian (reverses facing on the very ground it stands on -- it should NOT move at all); select the middle unit and press Ctrl+V for Macedonian (reverses facing AND advances onto new ground -- it visibly marches north, up-screen); select the right unit and press Ctrl+Shift+V for Laconian (reverses facing AND withdraws -- it visibly marches south, down-screen, the opposite way). All three share the V key with conversio (the existing plain-V about-face drill), since every plain letter hotkey is already claimed. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
